---
title: "mask_alignment_report"
author: "Joe Boyd"
date: "2026-06-11"
output:
  html_document: default
header-includes:
  - |
    <style>
    .main-container {
      width: min(96vw, 2400px);
      max-width: none;
    }
    </style>
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
mask_files = dir("alignment_assessment_plots/", pattern = "mask", full.names = TRUE)
wide_files = dir("alignment_assessment_plots/", pattern = "wide", full.names = TRUE)

mask_df = data.frame(mask_file = mask_files)
mask_df = mask_df %>% mutate(id = basename(mask_file) %>% sub(".+_images_", "", .) %>% sub(".png", "", .))

wide_df = data.frame(wide_file = wide_files)
wide_df = wide_df %>% mutate(id = basename(wide_file) %>% sub(".+_images_", "", .) %>% sub(".png", "", .))
stopifnot(setequal(wide_df$id, mask_df$id))

png_df = merge(mask_df, wide_df, by = "id")
```

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
n_to_show = 25
set.seed(0)
random_i = sample(seq(nrow(png_df))) 
selected_i = head(random_i, n = n_to_show)
```

```{r, fig.keep="all", fig.show="hold", out.width="49%", message=FALSE}
img_paths = unlist(lapply(selected_i, function(i){
  png_wide = png_df$wide_file[i]
  png_mask = png_df$mask_file[i]

  png_wide = gsub("^\"|\"$", "", png_wide)
  png_mask = gsub("^\"|\"$", "", png_mask)

  png_wide = gsub("\\\\", "/", png_wide)
  png_mask = gsub("\\\\", "/", png_mask)

  c(normalizePath(png_wide), normalizePath(png_mask))
}), use.names = FALSE)

knitr::include_graphics(img_paths)
```
